forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain after 2pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 54, with temperatures falling to around 52 in the afternoon. West northwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before 8pm, then a chance of rain showers between 8pm and 5am, then areas of frost and a slight chance of rain showers. Partly cloudy, with a low around 35. North northwest wind 2 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
